subject: Luvale
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Hana tushilikilo tumwe kuli valongi uvahule jila vazachishilamo tushilikilo
topics: Mutwe wachihande ou uneulula valongi halumbunwiso nazachiso yatushilikilo.
